phase_meaning: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction.
rewarded_behavior: Patience, rule-following, evidence discipline, avoiding premature conviction.
common_mistake: Overcommitting before the next phase is confirmed.
stress_meaning: Higher yields or weak duration pressure valuation multiples and long-duration growth.

pressure_detail.stress_meaning: Higher yields or weak duration pressure valuation multiples and long-duration growth.

allocation_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.
allocation_posture.condition: Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.

phase_rule.condition: Add after 50D reclaim or clean pullback.

allocation_posture.tilt: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality
allocation_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Require reset and confirmation.
allocation_posture.condition: Require reset and confirmation. Stress adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality.
allocation_posture.stress_adjustment: Reduce marginal adds; favor profitable quality

allocation_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Require breadth improvement.

allocation_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Deploy only after confirmation.

allocation_posture.reason: The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Cut if liquidity weakens.
The market is between regimes; confirmation matters more than prediction. Need route + evidence confirmation.

equity_posture.condition: Wait until liquidity and route repair.

phase_invalidation: SPX loses 200D or VIX stress rises above route threshold.
next_phase_watch: Watch sentiment/breadth for late-cycle euphoria or rate rollover for healthier expansion.
